SeaKing B01 Fiberglass Fillet Table (L25.6" x W16.9") & 2 Game Rated Rod Holders
body_html:
The SeaKing SK-B01 is a classic Fiberglass Fillet Table (Also known as Bait Boards) designed for durability and functionality on the water. Crafted with premium composite materials, it features a UV resistant PE plastic cutting board, a built-in sink with drain for convenient storage, and robust 316 marine grade stainless steel hardware.

Ideal for anglers seeking a reliable and practical bait board solution, the SeaKing SK-B01 combines traditional craftsmanship with modern materials for lasting performance in marine environments.
body_html_first_sentence: The SeaKing SK-B01 is a classic Fiberglass Fillet Table (Also known as Bait Boards) designed for durability and functionality on the water.

body_html:
The SK-E09 stands out as a premium option in the SeaKing range, characterised by its ergonomic design. It includes a spacious knife tray positioned at the front for quick and easy access, along with a deep storage sink featuring a drain. A distinctive feature of this board is its raised lip around the sides and back, ensuring secure retention of items even in rough conditions.

Handcrafted using top-grade composite materials, it incorporates a UV resistant PE plastic cutting board for durability. Crafted to meet the demands of serious anglers, this board combines functionality with premium quality materials, making it an excellent choice for fishing enthusiasts seeking reliability and performance on the water.

The SeaKing SKL-L06 is a heavy-duty bait board designed for serious anglers, featuring integrated cup holders, a knife tray, and a generously sized storage sink that spans nearly the entire length of the board. With the widest variety of mounting points available, these boards accommodate vessels of all sizes. Handcrafted using premium composite materials, they boast a UV resistant PE plastic cutting board for durability and longevity on the water.

title: SeaKing Game Rated Rod Holder
body_html:
Our Rod Holder is designed for serious anglers, keeping your gear secure during intense fishing sessions. They are game-rated, which means they’re built to handle the tough demands of game fishing and high drag pressures. Whether you’re chasing Marlin, Tuna, or other large fish, this holder is made to withstand the strength and pressure of battling big catches.

Made from 316 marine-grade stainless steel, the mounting hardware offers excellent protection against saltwater corrosion. This ensures that your equipment stays strong and reliable, even in harsh marine environments.

With this high-quality rod holder, you can fish with confidence, knowing your rod is securely in place, no matter the conditions.
body_html_first_sentence: Our Rod Holder is designed for serious anglers, keeping your gear secure during intense fishing sessions.
